creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201513
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-39.0.1 builds.

DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 38a to version 39.0.1.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-39.0.1.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
